notableEvents.label: Miguel Amaya GIDP · Bot 2
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Ian Happ scores. Moisés Ballesteros to 3rd. Michael Conforto out at 2nd. Miguel Amaya out at 1st.
